refinement_method: grid [-0.12,+0.15] scan + Brent bracket for sigma edges
caveat: ECT-native background via ect_background; sigma_8(0) profiled; grid-to-Brent refined; if best at lower boundary, 1s interval is [lower_grid, brent_upper] treated as one-sided upper bound after imposing eps>=0 prior.
notes: Growth ODE; mu_G=a^{-2eps}; 14 RSD points; Brent-refined
